_note: AUDIT/SPEC DOCUMENT ONLY — not loaded at runtime. OpenClaw has no auto-discovery for arbitrary JSON in config/. The live tool profile is wired in ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json under the tools{} and browser{} blocks. If this file and openclaw.json ever diverge, openclaw.json is authoritative.
guarantee: No tool moves funds and no tool emits/sets a payable amount. Payable figures come only from backend document-extraction + reconciliation; disbursement is a human-authorized Lane-A action. Contract tools handle documents only — no amount involved.
